CustomField.description: Set to true by NEPA_Plaintiff_Intelligence Flow when a PublicComplaint linked to this application is submitted by an organization matching a HIGH or VERY_HIGH record in NEPA_Plaintiff_Profile__mdt. Triggers a Legal Defensibility Review task and increases the litigation risk score by 25 points (PLAINTIFF_RISK_BONUS).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Known high-risk plaintiff organization has submitted a comment on this process. See Legal Defensibility Review task for details.
CustomField.label: Plaintiff Risk Flag
